overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city highway at night, featuring wet reflective asphalt, neon-lit concrete barriers, and towering overpasses. The scene transitions from a straight elevated highway to an intersection with traffic lights, showcasing the atmospheric lighting and futuristic architecture of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with concrete barriers and overpasses

events.description: a vehicle with red taillights passes by on the right highway lanes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy highway sidewalk between concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the highway lanes to the right

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier with yellow painted top edge running along the left side of the path
concrete barrier with purple neon accent lights on the right side of the highway
tall black poles with multiple horizontal LED light fixtures illuminating the fog
massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the highway above
large colorful digital billboard visible through the fog on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy elevated highway at night, with the camera walking forward between concrete barriers. Street lights cast warm yellow beams through the mist, while a car passes by on the right. Overpasses loom overhead, partially blocking the sky, and a distant neon billboard glows through the haze on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway section with city skyline becoming visible

events.description: second vehicle passes by on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as the path curves slightly to the right

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the highway lanes

entered.detail: digital billboard with blue and red colors visible on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the foggy highway as the path curves gently. A second car passes on the right, and the city skyline becomes visible through the mist in the distance. The overpass structure shifts to the left as the camera moves forward, and new neon signage appears on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp approaching intersection with traffic control

events.description: camera begins turning right at the highway exit ramp
approaching traffic light at Brandon Street intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right at the highway exit and approaching the intersection crosswalk

entered.detail: horizontal traffic light gantry with red lights and street name signs
green street sign reading 'Brandon' suspended over the intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the highway exit ramp, leaving the main highway barriers behind. The scene opens into a wider intersection approach with a traffic light gantry and 'Brandon' street sign becoming prominent. The camera continues toward the crosswalk as the foggy city skyline looms in the background, transitioning from the enclosed highway to the open intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an enclosed, foggy elevated highway into a wide, neon-lit city intersection. It begins by walking forward between concrete barriers under looming overpasses, where warm yellow street lights pierce through the mist and a car passes on the right. As the path curves gently, the camera moves past a second vehicle while the city skyline and new neon signage gradually emerge through the haze. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right onto an exit ramp, leaving the highway barriers behind to enter a more open environment. Finally, the view expands toward a traffic light gantry and a Brandon street sign, approaching a crosswalk with the foggy skyline looming in the background.
